const { isArray } = Array; const { getPrototypeOf, prototype: objectProto, keys: getKeys } = Object; export function argsArgArrayOrObject(args) { if (args.length === 1) { const first = args[0]; if (isArray(first)) { return { args: first, keys: null }; } if (isPOJO(first)) { const keys = getKeys(first); return { args: keys.map((key) => first[key]), keys, }; } } return { args: args, keys: null }; } function isPOJO(obj) { return obj && typeof obj === 'object' && getPrototypeOf(obj) === objectProto; } //# sourceMappingURL=argsArgArrayOrObject.js.map
